message.content:
@startuml
actor browser
participant listener
database sequence_1
control http_inbound_travelocity
entity OIDC_IdP
boundary http_inbound_commonauth
rectangle "sequence_2" { }

browser ->> listener : SAML login request
listener ->> sequence_1 : SAML login request
http_inbound_travelocity <-+ sequence_1 : request
note right of sequence_1 #paleyellow# 
SAML request process\nOIDC request build
end note
activate sequence_1
deactivate sequence_1
sequence_1 --> http_inbound_travelocity : Redirect to IDP
http_inbound_travelocity -x-> browser : Redirect to IDP
browser <-- OIDC_IdP : login page
browser -->> OIDC_IdP : Submit credentials
OIDC_IdP ->> http_inbound_commonauth : ID token
http_inbound_commonauth ->> sequence_2 : ID token
note left of sequence_2 #paleyellow#: \nOIDC response process\nSAML response build
sequence_2 <--> http_inbound_commonauth : SAML response
http_inbound_commonauth <<--X browser : SAML response


@enduml
